zsh.c(3) Library Functions Manual zsh.c(3)

NAME

zsh.c - Zsh shell completion script generator with category grouping.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


asciichat_error_t completions_generate_zsh (FILE *output)

Detailed Description

Zsh shell completion script generator with category grouping.

Definition in file zsh.c.

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t completions_generate_zsh (FILE * output)

Definition at line 145 of file zsh.c.

145                                                          {
146   if (!output) {
147     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Output stream cannot be NULL");
148   }
149 
150   fprintf(output, "#compdef _ascii_chat ascii-chat\n"
151                   "# Zsh completion script for ascii-chat\n"
152                   "# Generated from options registry - DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY\n"
153                   "\n"
154                   "_ascii_chat() {\n"
155                   "  if [[ \"${words[2]}\" == -* ]]; then\n"
156                   "    _ascii_chat_discovery\n"
157                   "    return 0\n"
158                   "  fi\n"
159                   "  local curcontext=\"$curcontext\" state line modes\n"
160                   "  _arguments -s \\\n"
161                   "    '1: :->mode' \\\n"
162                   "    '(*):args:_ascii_chat_args' && return\n"
163                   "  [[ -n \"$state\" ]] || return 1\n"
164                   "  case $state in\n"
165                   "    mode)\n"
166                   "      local -a server_modes client_modes\n"
167                   "      server_modes=(\n");
168 
169   /* Generate server-like modes from registry */
170   size_t mode_server_count = 0;
171   const mode_descriptor_t *mode_server_descs = get_modes_by_group("server-like", &mode_server_count);
172   if (mode_server_descs) {
173     for (size_t i = 0; i < mode_server_count; i++) {
174       fprintf(output, "        '%s:%s'\n", mode_server_descs[i].name, mode_server_descs[i].description);
175     }
176     SAFE_FREE(mode_server_descs);
177   }
178 
179   fprintf(output, "      )\n"
180                   "      client_modes=(\n");
181 
182   /* Generate client-like modes from registry (exclude discovery since it's the default mode) */
183   size_t mode_client_count = 0;
184   const mode_descriptor_t *mode_client_descs = get_modes_by_group("client-like", &mode_client_count);
185   if (mode_client_descs) {
186     for (size_t i = 0; i < mode_client_count; i++) {
187       /* Skip discovery mode - it's the default when no mode is specified */
188       if (strcmp(mode_client_descs[i].name, "discovery") == 0) {
189         continue;
190       }
191       fprintf(output, "        '%s:%s'\n", mode_client_descs[i].name, mode_client_descs[i].description);
192     }
193     SAFE_FREE(mode_client_descs);
194   }
195 
196   fprintf(output, "      )\n"
197                   "      _describe -t server-modes 'server-like modes' server_modes\n"
198                   "      _describe -t client-modes 'client-like modes' client_modes\n"
199                   "      ;;\n"
200                   "  esac\n"
201                   "}\n"
202                   "\n"
203                   "_ascii_chat_args() {\n"
204                   "  case $words[2] in\n"
205                   "    server)\n"
206                   "      _ascii_chat_server\n"
207                   "      ;;\n"
208                   "    discovery-service)\n"
209                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery_service\n"
210                   "      ;;\n"
211                   "    client)\n"
212                   "      _ascii_chat_client\n"
213                   "      ;;\n"
214                   "    mirror)\n"
215                   "      _ascii_chat_mirror\n"
216                   "      ;;\n"
217                   "    discovery)\n"
218                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery\n"
219                   "      ;;\n"
220                   "    *)\n"
221                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery\n"
222                   "      ;;\n"
223                   "  esac\n"
224                   "}\n"
225                   "\n"
226                   "# Server-like modes: handle incoming connections and stream management\n"
227                   "_ascii_chat_server() {\n");
228 
229   /* Server options - grouped by category */
230   size_t server_count = 0;
231   const option_descriptor_t *server_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_SERVER, false, &server_count);
232 
233   if (server_opts) {
234     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, server_opts, server_count, "server");
235     SAFE_FREE(server_opts);
236   }
237 
238   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
239                   "}\n"
240                   "\n"
241                   "_ascii_chat_discovery_service() {\n");
242 
243   /* Discovery-service options - grouped by category */
244   size_t discovery_svc_count = 0;
245   const option_descriptor_t *discovery_svc_opts =
246       options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY_SERVICE, false, &discovery_svc_count);
247 
248   if (discovery_svc_opts) {
249     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, discovery_svc_opts, discovery_svc_count, "discovery_service");
250     SAFE_FREE(discovery_svc_opts);
251   }
252 
253   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
254                   "}\n"
255                   "\n"
256                   "# Client-like modes: connect to servers or render local media\n"
257                   "_ascii_chat_client() {\n");
258 
259   /* Client options - grouped by category */
260   size_t client_count = 0;
261   const option_descriptor_t *client_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_CLIENT, false, &client_count);
262 
263   if (client_opts) {
264     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, client_opts, client_count, "client");
265     SAFE_FREE(client_opts);
266   }
267 
268   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
269                   "}\n"
270                   "\n"
271                   "_ascii_chat_mirror() {\n");
272 
273   /* Mirror options - grouped by category */
274   size_t mirror_count = 0;
275   const option_descriptor_t *mirror_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_MIRROR, false, &mirror_count);
276 
277   if (mirror_opts) {
278     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, mirror_opts, mirror_count, "mirror");
279     SAFE_FREE(mirror_opts);
280   }
281 
282   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
283                   "}\n"
284                   "\n"
285                   "# Discovery mode: find sessions via discovery service (default mode when no mode specified)\n"
286                   "_ascii_chat_discovery() {\n");
287 
288   /* For discovery mode, get all options (binary + mode-specific) in a single call */
289   size_t discovery_count = 0;
290   const option_descriptor_t *discovery_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY, true, &discovery_count);
291 
292   if (discovery_opts) {
293     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, discovery_opts, discovery_count, "discovery");
294     SAFE_FREE(discovery_opts);
295   }
296 
297   // Return after all option sets are described (prevents zsh fallback completion)
298   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
299                   "}\n"
300                   "\n"
301                   "_ascii_chat \"$@\"\n");
302 
303   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
304 }




References get_modes_by_group(), and
    options_registry_get_for_display().


Referenced by completions_generate_for_shell().
